claimText: C-FLOOD is a web-based platform that provides 2-day advance flood inundation forecasts up to the village level.
evidenceExcerpt: C-FLOOD provides 2-day advance flood inundation forecasts up to the village level.
examUse: Statement-based question on the forecast duration and geographical granularity of the C-FLOOD platform.

claimText: The C-FLOOD platform utilizes advanced 2-D hydrodynamic modelling to generate flood inundation maps and water level predictions.
evidenceExcerpt: The platform utilizes advanced 2-D hydrodynamic modelling for flood inundation maps and water level predictions.
examUse: Statement-based question on the underlying technology used for flood forecasting in C-FLOOD.

claimText: C-FLOOD was jointly developed by C-DAC, the Central Water Commission (CWC) under the Ministry of Jal Shakti, and the National Remote Sensing Centre (NRSC).
evidenceExcerpt: It was jointly developed by C-DAC, Central Water Commission (CWC), Ministry of Jal Shakti, and NRSC.
examUse: Institution-feature or correct-pair question identifying the collaborative agencies behind C-FLOOD.
distractorHooks: Developed solely by the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA)
Developed by the Indian Meteorological Department (IMD)
Developed by the Ministry of Earth Sciences
